nodes.title: Help Give a Voice to an Abused Child
ChildSafe Distributes Cardboard Kids® to Public at Area Malls March 3 & 4 and 10 & 11 to Prepare for National Child Abuse Prevention Month
ChildSafe Kicks-Off National Child Abuse Prevention Month

pageContext.content:
Community Leaders Support ChildSafe

 

 

ChildSafe has spent 25 years serving the children and families in our community as they heal from the effects of child abuse. Today, we share with you their new TV commercial that speaks to the crucial work done by their organization. Please help them reach their fundraising goal of $1 million in the month of April by visiting www.childsafe-sa.org.

The PM Group has been the agency of record for ChildSafe for three years.

About The PM Group: The PM Group was founded in 1988. Over the past 29 years, the agency has continued to grow and is currently listed as San Antonio’s Largest Advertising Agency by the San Antonio Business Journal. The PM Group’s client roster spans various industries including automotive, CPG, entertainment and sports marketing, legal, business services, non-profit, real estate and fitness. In addition, the agency hosts an annual Charity Gala that to date raised over $1 million for local San Antonio area non-profit organizations.
